inputs.text: Mujhe bahut kamzori hai, bukhar bhi hai, sir dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and headache could be initial symptoms

inputs.text: Bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai, kabz bhi hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Step-wise increase in fever and abdominal pain

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation could be gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Fever pattern not typical for viral fever

inputs.text: Tez bukhar ho raha hai, kabz ke baad dast ho gaya hai, bahut kamzori hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Classic symptoms of typhoid: high fever, diarrhea after constipation, rash

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Diarrhea could be gastroenteritis, but fever pattern and rash are not typical

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Fever pattern not typical for malaria

inputs.text: Bahut thakaan ho rahi hai, bukhar abhi tak hai, pet mein bahut dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Prolonged fever, severe abdominal pain, and dehydration are complications of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to fever pattern and abdominal pain

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to fever pattern and absence of typical symptoms
